hero.title: Equipment by department. Integrated through one PEIC relationship.
hero.description:
PEIC manufactures CSSD and sterilisation systems in Mumbai, and supplies authorised partner-brand equipment from 14+ global and domestic brands across the wider hospital: 
OT, imaging, oncology, critical care, neonatal care, dental, ENT, diagnostics, labs, and research facilities. 
One PEIC team supports specification, quotation, documentation, installation, training, and service planning.

specialties_heading.label: Specialty Equipment Portfolios
specialties_heading.title: Multi-department portfolios supported through one PEIC relationship.
specialties_heading.description: From CSSD and OT to imaging, oncology, neonatal care, dental, ENT, and many others. PEIC helps biomedical and procurement teams consolidate specification support, quotation coordination, installation, training, and service planning.

specialties.title: CSSD & Sterilization
specialties.description: CSSD infrastructure from one accountable supplier: horizontal autoclaves, flash sterilizers, vertical units, bedpan sterilizers, CSSD furniture, and sterile-processing workflow support.

specialties.title: Operating Theatre (OT) Integration
specialties.description: Surgical tables, OT lighting, electrosurgical systems, suction, illumination, and theatre equipment sourced through PEIC's partner portfolio and supported through coordinated service planning.

specialties.title: Oncology & Ablation
specialties.description: Locoregional ablation and oncology-support systems, including RFA, microwave ablation, NanoKnife IRE, and imaging workflow support through relevant partner technologies.

specialties.title: Diagnostic Imaging & Radiology
specialties.description: Portable digital radiography, endoscopic ultrasound, CBCT imaging, and imaging post-processing options configured for radiology and specialty departments.

specialties.title: Maternal / Neonatal Care
specialties.description: NICU and maternity ward equipment, including radiant warmers, phototherapy, syringe pumps, infusion pumps, and NST systems for labour ward and neonatal workflows.

specialties.title: Dental Suites & CBCT
specialties.description: Dental chairs, delivery units, CBCT imaging, and operatory infrastructure for clinics, departments, and dental practice expansion projects.

specialties.title: ENT, Vestibular Diagnostics & Rehabilitation
specialties.description: ENT workstations, vestibular diagnostic systems, and rehabilitation equipment for specialty clinics, diagnostic departments, and hospital programs.

specialties.title: Surgical Instruments, Suction & OT Accessories
specialties.description: Surgical instruments, suction systems, drainage solutions, illumination, and OT accessories that support theatre readiness and procedural workflows.

industries_heading.label: Client Segments
industries_heading.title: Institutions we equip
industries_heading.description: PEIC serves facilities where equipment reliability, technical documentation, installation support, and post-sale service accountability matter from the first purchase conversation.

industries.title: Healthcare
industries.description: Government tertiary hospitals, private hospitals, specialty clinics, and diagnostic centres, from CSSD infrastructure projects to department-specific equipment supply.

industries.title: Pharma & Biopharma
industries.description: Sterilisation, cleanroom-aligned equipment, and support infrastructure for pharmaceutical manufacturing environments, QC laboratories, and production facilities.

industries.title: Medical Device Manufacturers
industries.description: Sterilisation, validation, and testing equipment support for Indian medical device manufacturers, component suppliers, and assembly environments.

industries.title: Diagnostic Labs
industries.description: Laboratory sterilisation, imaging systems, and diagnostic equipment support for standalone diagnostic centres and hospital-affiliated labs.

industries.title: Research Institutes
industries.description: Sterilisation systems, laboratory autoclaves, biomedical waste sanitisation, and department-support equipment for CSIR labs, universities, and research institutions.

cta.label: Technical Planning
cta.title: Planning a new department, upgrade, or replacement purchase?
cta.description: PEIC’s technical team can help map your requirement across departments and recommend a practical mix of PEIC-manufactured systems and authorised partner-brand equipment.
